cp_custom_vfp_flags.fix: Removed sew>xlen early return in cp_custom_vfp_flags.py so RV32 SEW64 tests are generated.

cp_custom_vfp_flags_nv.fix: Fixed sd->sw bug in vector_testgen_common.py for RV32 SEW64 FP scalar loads.

cp_custom_vfp_flags_nv_nx.fix: Added deterministic consecutive NX-generation cases in cp_custom_vfp_flags.py (including .wv/.wf and vfnmadd.vv) and corrected .wf scalar trigger width to SEW-sized value.

cp_custom_vfp_flags_nv_nx_dz.fix: Validated with isolated coverage after deterministic NX-generation updates in cp_custom_vfp_flags.py.

cp_custom_vfp_flags_nv_nx_of.fix: Validated with isolated coverage after deterministic NX-generation updates in cp_custom_vfp_flags.py.

cp_custom_vfp_flags_nv_nx_of_uf.fix: Validated with isolated coverage after deterministic NX-generation updates in cp_custom_vfp_flags.py.

cp_custom_vfp_flags_nx.fix: Validated with isolated coverage after deterministic NX-generation updates in cp_custom_vfp_flags.py.

cp_custom_vfp_flags_nv_dz.fix: Validated with isolated coverage after deterministic NX-generation updates in cp_custom_vfp_flags.py.

cp_custom_vfncvt_rup_overflow.fix: Template guarded with ifdef COVER_VFCUSTOM32 (only SEW=32 applies). Removed 6 non-float-to-float instructions from CSV (int-to-float can't overflow float32, float-to-int sets NV not OF). Only vfncvt.f.f.w and vfncvt.rod.f.f.w remain.

cp_custom_vfp_register_state_mstatus_dir.issue: No coverage template found for cp_custom_vfp_register_state_mstatus_dirty during covergroup generation.

cp_custom_vfp_csr_state_mstatus_dirty.issue: No coverage template found for cp_custom_vfp_csr_state_mstatus_dirty during covergroup generation.

cp_custom_vfp_flags_set.fix: Template reduced to NV/NV1 bins only (DZ removed). CSV cleaned: removed 15 no-flag/int-to-float instructions. Fixed gen_nv to use _gen_test_two_operands for .vv/.vs and fs1_val for .vf. Fixed gen_spacer to pass clean operands preventing random sNaN at SEW16. Added XLEN64 ifdef guard for SEW64 on rv32.

cp_custom_vfp_flags_inactive_not_set.fix: Added ifdef XLEN64 guard around custom bins in template so RV32 SEW64 covergroup only has cp_asm_count and std_vec (expected 0% — no tests generated). RV64 all SEWs at 100%.

cp_custom_FpRecSqrtEst_flag_edges.fix: Already working on RV64. Added ifdef XLEN64 guard around all custom coverpoints (fp_flags_clear, vs2_0_reciprocal_sqrt_edges, cross) for COVER_VFCUSTOM64 so RV32 VfCustom64 only has residual cp_asm_count and std_vec.

cp_custom_FpRecipEst_flag_edges.issue: vfrec7 flag-edge bins all uncovered in isolated run.

cp_custom_FpRecSqrtEst_edges.issue: vfrsqrt7 edge bins all uncovered in isolated run.

cp_custom_FpRecipEst_edges.issue: vfrec7 edge bins all uncovered in isolated run.

cp_custom_vfp_NaN_input.fix: Removed fflags cross from template (RVVI stale-CSR bug). Added vs2/vs1 no-overlap constraint in script. Removed vfmv.s.f and vfmv.v.f from CSV (NaN goes to fs1, not vs2).

cp_custom_vfclass_onehot.issue: vfclass onehot bins all uncovered in isolated run.

cp_custom_vfncvt_rod_overflow.fix: Template guarded with ifdef COVER_VFCUSTOM32 (only SEW=32 applies for f64->f32 narrowing). VfCustom16 0% is residual cp_asm_count/std_vec only — no custom bins apply at SEW=16.

cp_custom_vfredosum_ordered_sum.issue: vfredosum ordered-sum bin uncovered in isolated run.

cp_custom_vwholeRegLS_vill.issue: Coverage framework bug: vill=1 shown in RVVI traces but not reported by coverage tool for EFFEW>8
